name: PURE BIOSCIENCE, INC.
business: PURE Bioscience develops and commercializes antimicrobial products based on patented stabilized ionic silver (SDC). Its products include PURE Hard Surface, a food contact surface sanitizer and disinfectant, and PURE Control, a direct food contact processing aid. The company sells directly to end-use customers and through third-party distributors, primarily serving the food industry.

exposures.sentence: Our registered offerings include PURE Hard Surface, a food contact surface sanitizer and disinfectant designed for restaurant chains, food processors, and transportation companies, as well as PURE Control , a direct food contact processing aid.
